metadata.title: Alcotheque – Wine & Spirits Collection Manager | iOS App
metadata.description: Scan, organize and track your wine and spirits collection with AI. Available on iPhone. Download for free.
metadata.ogTitle: Alcotheque – Your wine & spirits cellar on iPhone
metadata.ogDescription: Scan your bottles, organize your collection, and track every gift with artificial intelligence.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Built for true wine and spirits enthusiasts.

scan.title: AI Bottle Scanner
scan.text: Photograph a label, AI automatically extracts all the details.

wineSpirits.title: Wine AND Spirits
wineSpirits.text: The only app that manages your cellar and your bar in one place.

gifts.title: Gift Tracking
gifts.text: Never forget who gifted you which bottle and when.

value.title: Collection Value
value.text: Track the estimated value of your collection in real time.

locations.title: Location Management
locations.text: Cellar, bar, living room — organize your bottles wherever they are.

languages.title: 7 Languages
languages.text: French, English, German, Spanish, Italian, Dutch, Portuguese.

hero.tagline: Your wine & spirits collection, always with you.
hero.subtext: Scan your bottles, organize your collection, track every gift.
hero.ctaAria: Download Alcotheque on the App Store

schema.description: Premium iOS app to manage wine and spirits collections: scanning, organizing, and AI-powered tracking.
